sellers_note: Wanna drive? CarMax puts you in the driver's seat-and that includes transparency and pricing without document or processing fees. Certain cars may have unrepaired safety recalls, so check nhtsa.gov/recalls to find out if this vehicle has any unrepaired safety recalls. With this information and more, you're empowered to drive the when, the where, and the how of your experience. At CarMax, you can shop your way, whether that's online, in-store, or a combination of both, and we stand behind every used car we sell with a 10-day money back guarantee. See store and carmax.com for details. Price includes all costs to be paid by consumer, except for licensing costs, registration fees, and taxes. Price assumes that final purchase will be made in the State of NJ, unless vehicle is non-transferable. Vehicle subject to prior sale. Applicable transfer fees are due in advance of vehicle delivery and are separate from sales transactions. Limited warranty is 90 days/4,000 mi, whichever's first. See store for details. We make every effort to provide accurate information, but please verify before purchasing. Inventory shown here is updated every 24 hours.
features: ["Alloy Wheels", "Blind Spot Monitor", "Bluetooth\u00ae", "Heated Steering Wheel", "Lane Departure Warning", "Leather Seats", "Memory Seat", "Navigation System", "Rain Sensing Wipers", "Backup Camera", "WiFi Hotspot"]
